name: Chinese Chow Mein Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Celery, cut into half-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a deep skillet until it is fully separated.
2. Add the celery and onion. Cook over low heat until the onion becomes transparent and glazed.
3. Meanwhile, place 1 cup of rice in 2 cups of water and cook for 15 minutes, or until fluffy and tender. Rinse the cooked rice in warm water, drain, and add to the hamburger mixture.
4. Stir in the mushroom soup and celery soup. Add the milk, salt, and pepper. Mix everything thoroughly.
5. Pour into a greased 1-1/2 quart casserole dish and sprinkle the chow mein noodles over the top.
6. Place in a preheated oven at 350°F for 30 minutes. Serve with soy sauce if desired.
